output_redirect.reason: Configured project_knowledge (docs/) is the published DocFX documentation site and is referenced by 80+ product-code, test, CI, and validation-fixture sites. Per user decision, BMAD output was redirected to _bmad-output/project-docs/ so docs/ is left completely untouched.

project_classification.summary: Hexalith.FrontComposer is a .NET 10 Blazor 'front shell' framework. A single Roslyn incremental source generator turns [Projection]/[Command]-annotated domain types into Blazor views, command forms, Fluxor state, DI registrations, and an MCP manifest. A runtime Blazor shell composes the generated UI; an MCP server exposes the same domain surface to AI agents; a CLI inspects and migrates generated output.

technology_stack.language: C# latest, Nullable enable, ImplicitUsings enable, TreatWarningsAsErrors true
technology_stack.target_frameworks: net10.0 (most); net10.0 + netstandard2.0 multi-target for Contracts and SourceTools
technology_stack.testing: xUnit v3 3.2.2, Shouldly 4.3.0, NSubstitute 5.3.0, bUnit 2.7.2, Verify 31.19.0, FsCheck.Xunit.v3 3.3.3, PactNet 5.0.1, BenchmarkDotNet 0.15.8, coverlet 10.0.1; Playwright e2e (tests/e2e)
technology_stack.release: semantic-release (Conventional Commits) -> signed NuGet packages; no containers

completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith, single part, project_type=library with source-generator/blazor-ui/mcp-server/cli facets; 7 src + 7 test + 6 sample projects.

Discovered existing docs: published DocFX site under docs/ (Diataxis), CONTRIBUTING.md, ONBOARDING.md, README.md, 7 .github/workflows. Root-declared submodules now live under references/ and own their project context where present.

Tech stack captured from Directory.Packages.props + Directory.Build.props/targets: .NET 10, Blazor FluentUI v5 RC3, Fluxor, Roslyn 5.3.0 generator, MCP SDK 1.3.0, NUlid, SignalR, OIDC; centralized packages; TreatWarningsAsErrors.

Conditional analysis via 6 per-project subagents: MCP tools/resources, Blazor component catalog, source-generator attribute contract + HFC1001-HFC1070 diagnostics, CLI commands, test stack. Written into api-contracts.md, component-inventory.md, data-models.md.
source-tree-analysis.md written: annotated repo tree, per-project folders, critical folders, entry points.
Dev/build/test/deploy/contribution info extracted from ci.yml, .releaserc.json, CONTRIBUTING.md, commitlint, package.json; written to development-guide.md, deployment-guide.md, contribution-guide.md.
Single-part monolith; no cross-part integration architecture needed (submodule integration documented in architecture.md section 8).
architecture.md written: layering, generation pipeline, runtime composition, MCP boundary, cross-cutting invariants, observed ADRs, submodule deps.
Supporting docs written: project-overview.md, component-inventory.md, development-guide.md, deployment-guide.md, contribution-guide.md, api-contracts.md, data-models.md.
Master index.md written (single-part navigation); all generated + existing docs linked; no incomplete markers.
Validation: 10 md + 1 json present; zero incomplete-doc markers; all cross-doc ./*.md links resolve; checklist sections satisfied (multi-part items N/A).
Finalized. workflow.on_complete resolved empty; no terminal instruction.

findings.technology_stack: .NET 10, Blazor FluentUI v5, Fluxor, Roslyn incremental generator, MCP server, CLI

parts.Contracts: Leaf shared kernel (net10.0 + netstandard2.0): generator-discovered attributes, command/query/lifecycle interfaces, rendering model, DomainManifest, MCP descriptors, schema fingerprint/baseline/delta types, FcDiagnosticIds.
parts.Schema: Thin lib on Contracts: SchemaContractFamilyNames + SchemaMigrationDeltaAnalyzer.
parts.Shell: Blazor front-shell UI library: FrontComposerShell layout, Fc* component catalog, Fluxor state, EventStore SignalR/HTTP clients, theming/density/accessibility. FluentUI v5 + Fluxor + SignalR + OIDC + NUlid.
parts.SourceTools: Single Roslyn incremental generator (netstandard2.0). [Projection]->5 files, [Command]->7 non-page files plus optional CommandPage, MCP manifest; HFC1001-HFC1070 diagnostics; opt-in drift detection; pure equatable IR.
parts.Mcp: ASP.NET Core MCP server (HTTP streamable): dynamic command tools + lifecycle tool; projection + skill-corpus resources; fail-closed gates; schema fingerprint negotiation.
parts.Cli: frontcomposer dotnet tool: inspect + migrate; bespoke parser; OutputSanitizer; atomic writes; exit codes 0-4.
parts.Testing: Publishable bUnit test-host library: FrontComposerTestBase, AddFrontComposerTestHost, deterministic fakes, evidence + redaction, generated-component assertions.

resume_instructions: Workflow complete (initial deep scan). Outputs are in _bmad-output/project-docs/ (NOT the configured docs/). To refresh, re-run /bmad-document-project; choose re-scan and keep output redirected to _bmad-output/project-docs/ to preserve the published docs/ site.
